---
title: "judge"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=.@"]
---

# judge

```{julia}
# if 1 is not allowed.
x, y = 1, 2
if x < y
    println("The max number is $y")
elseif x > y
    println("The max number is $x")
else 
    println("The numbers are equal")
end
```
